name: Host Directory Human Review Request Changes Pipeline
description: Host-directory workflow with human review and one routed rework cycle.
outcome: A host-mounted content packet returns for revision once before final approval.

definition.process_instructions: The host content strategist drafts the packet in a host-mounted workspace. The host technical editor prepares it. A human review gate requests one revision before approval. The host launch planner packages the final approved packet.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this live workflow should accomplish

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.

stages.name: approval-gate
stages.goal: A human decision exists for the brief.

stages.name: launch-packaging
stages.goal: The approved launch packet is ready.
